content.boundary: Applies only to monitoring/reporting infrastructure around existing 6/8-year gimnázium admissions; does not alter selection ages, admissions criteria, or maintainer structures.
content.change_lever: Continue existing statutory framework (Act CXC of 2011) unchanged; add mandatory data collection and public reporting on segregation, value-added, and equity metrics tied to the tracks.
content.name: Status quo with monitoring (passive counterfactual)
content.system_problem: Early academic selection at ages 10-12 is associated with Hungary's highest-in-EU socioeconomic and ethnic segregation, but no discrete legislative proposal currently targets the structural existence of the tracks, and political actors face strong veto constituencies against abolition.
